title: carpinus laxiflora var. tientaiensis
intro: Carpinus laxiflora var. tientaiensis is a plant species of the family Betulaceae, commonly known as a type of hornbeam. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as relieving coughs, fever, and sore throats, as well as reducing inflammation and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, Carpinus laxiflora var. tientaiensis is often used in combination with other herbs to create decoctions, infusions, or topical applications, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
